reviews.comment:
Olor feo a cloaca en la estación  los baños limpios pero ni jabón para higienizarse las manos

(Translated by Google)
The station smelled awful like sewage; the bathrooms were clean but there wasn't even soap to wash your hands.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9804125904812315909/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRck5LTUxnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy completo shoop para comer o comprar algo. Muy buenos baños para los sufridos viajeros que llegamos con la vejiga a punto de estallar

(Translated by Google)
A very well-stocked shop for eating or buying something. Excellent restrooms for us weary travelers who arrive with our bladders about to burst.
